Video.summary: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Columbus Hotshots in a mixed NPL team match.
Video.title: Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)

Image.alt: Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)
Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)
Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)

Video.summary: Catch the collegiate pickleball excitement from Week 2, Day 2 of the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This intense team match features Utah Tech taking on Utah State as they compete for a national bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri.The episode features commentary on the exploding growth of college pickleball with college legend and Yola's College Relationship Manager, Timber Tucker. Watch key matchups in men's doubles, women's singles, and the deciding mixed doubles games. Key players include Gavin Fowler (singles 5.2 rating) , Brinley Horton , and Bo Cavell from Utah Tech, as well as standout players Olivia and Brady.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) continues on Day 5 at the CCI Brabourne Stadium with a clash between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Video.summary: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Video.summary: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Video.summary: John Hedberg and Patrick Cote take on Jose Derisi and Scott Crandall in this Men's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Megan Fudge along with husband Ryler Deheart faced off against Simone Jardim & Kyle Yates in a Semifinal match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: The high-stakes action continues on Day 9 with the Second Semi-Final of the World Pickleball League (WPBL), featuring Pune United against Mumbai Pickle Power. The air is thick with anticipation, especially with the major news that Mumbai's star player, Brandon Lane, may not be available for the matchup.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Video.summary: It's a high-stakes "Wednesday evening pickleball party" on Day 6 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as Pune United takes on the Chennai Super Champs at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. With both teams currently sitting low on the points table (fifth and sixth), this game is a crucial must-win for both, offering a chance for one team to gain much-needed inspiration and move up the standings.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Video.title: NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU
NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU
NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU

Video.summary: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Video.summary: Live from The Picklr in Noblesville, this NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 matchup features a critical battle between the University of Wisconsin-Madison and Purdue University. With eight national bids and $5,000 in prize money on the line, the stakes are high as the 16th-seeded Purdue takes on the 17th-seeded Wisconsin in a best-of-seven format.The match kicks off with Gender Doubles, where Wisconsin’s duo of Noah and Sarah Sowinski showcase dominant net play and quick hands against Purdue’s Caleb Yang and Trevor Ju. Watch for standout moments, including an incredible Ernie from Wisconsin and strategic adjustments in the Mixed Doubles games involving Colton Thielman and Elena Schlichte.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Video.summary: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
